findings.title: Layer violation: llm → models
findings.why_it_matters: Layer 'llm' imports from 'models' which is above it in the architecture.  Upward imports collapse layer separation and create hidden coupling.

evidence.note: llm (layer 4) → models (layer 2)

fix_options: Move the shared code to a lower layer or create an interface in 'models'.
Add an explicit exception in allowed_cross_layer with a documented reason.

findings.title: Direct env access: FRONTEND_URL in api/main.py
findings.why_it_matters: 'FRONTEND_URL' is accessed via os.environ/os.getenv directly in application code instead of through a settings class. Scattered env access makes it impossible to know what configuration a service actually needs.

evidence.note: Direct environment variable access outside settings module

fix_options: Move this access into a centralised settings/config module.
Add the file pattern to allow_direct_env if this is intentional.
